claims.claim: Prometheus is a candidate regenerative infrastructure architecture.
claims.mandatory_qualification: A candidate architecture subject to evidence, legal, operational and market gates.

claims.claim: OHE is the minimum deployable unit.
claims.mandatory_qualification: A biophysical and stewardship unit from which evidence may be generated.

claims.claim: PRU makes verified performance analytically comparable.
claims.mandatory_qualification: PRU is an analytical interface and creates no rights.
Portfolio-readable does not mean fund, demand, liquidity or investability.
Testable hypotheses; no site performance admitted.
Literature signal only; context and limitations disclosed.
Records support traceability; they do not create ecological truth.
AI prepares and flags; humans, evidence, method, governance and law control.
No native Prometheus token is admitted in v7.0.
No Prometheus rights, governance or value arise from holding TRBK.
Conditionally admissible after data, security, contract and legal review.

claims.claim: P2 merchant acceptance may be evaluated.
claims.mandatory_qualification: USD-denominated invoices; live pilot only after all gates and Gate Review.
claims.blocked_wording: “Pay with TRBK now”; fixed token price

claims.claim: GENIUS Act may inform approved stablecoin-provider diligence.
claims.mandatory_qualification: Prometheus is not presumed to be a stablecoin issuer.
Pending/unfinished status at cut-off; no safe harbour relied upon.
Rights require separate legal instruments and admission.
No empirical, legal, market or independent-assurance pass is implied.

claims.claim: Prometheus is prepared for review under specified institutional-grade lenses.
claims.mandatory_qualification: No named institution has reviewed, endorsed or approved unless separately evidenced.

claims.claim: The current repository is an Institutional Pilot Evidence Room.
claims.mandatory_qualification: Not an offering or Investor Data Room before G5 and G7.

claims.claim: Executable controls may be tested within a stated model and environment.
claims.mandatory_qualification: Assumptions, counterexamples, scope and independent status disclosed.

claims.claim: Complexity models may explore scenarios under stated assumptions.
claims.mandatory_qualification: No site evidence, forecast, PRU or capital weight unless separately admitted.
claims.blocked_wording: The model proves/predicts regeneration or returns
